summary: Independent QA R2 acceptance could not be completed because the replacement QA thread produced no terminal handoff after three wait windows and was closed.

decisions.decision: RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 remains REVIEW; no downstream RR0 task is started.
Replacement QA thread 019f4af7-0470-7771-a5b7-143245c9f7e1 is closed and retained in registry history.

risks.summary: The R2 state fix has a validated writer handoff, but independent QA acceptance remains unavailable.

blockers: No independent QA ACCEPT or REQUEST_CHANGES handoff was produced by the replacement reviewer.
requested_action: Resume with one fresh independent qa_reviewer when the project is continued; do not start downstream RR0 work until QA ACCEPTs the R2 handoff.
